name.description: Identifier used to refer to the lava type.

description.description: Optional description of what this applies to or is used for.

duration.description: Animation speed multiplier. Smaller values scroll faster.

scale.description: World-space pattern scale. Larger values yield bigger features.

crustThreshold.description: Heat level below which crust tones dominate.

crustAmount.description: How much secondary crust noise darkens the surface.

crustSharpness.description: Contrast of crust vs molten regions.

emissiveStrength.description: Emission intensity of hot areas on the lava surface and on nearby geometry.

specularStrength.description: Specular highlight strength on molten ripples.

waveStrength.description: Height of close-up normal ripples on the lava surface.

surfaceGlow.description: Multiplier for molten glow on the lava surface itself.

irradianceStrength.description: How strongly this lava type lights up nearby terrain and objects.

animSpeed.description: Animation speed multiplier. Stacks with duration (higher = faster motion).
